title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates:
Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates!
